text: I received my order yesterday, and while I was thrilled to get it, I noticed you sent me the wrong item. I actually ordered a blue jacket, but there’s a green one in the box. Since this isn’t what I wanted at all, I’d really like to get a refund instead of getting the right one sent back. It’s not that I don’t appreciate your efforts, but it’s quite frustrating trying to sort this out. Can someone please help me with the process for getting my money back?
I'm really frustrated because I paid for a service that still hasn’t been activated. It's been weeks, and every time I reach out, I get vague responses. I just want this resolved!

Hello! I recently noticed a charge on my account that I wasn't expecting. I thought I had signed up for a free trial, but it seems I've been billed for something? It's kinda frustrating, and I'm not exactly sure how it happened. Could you please help me sort this out? Thanks so much!
I can't access my account, it keeps saying my password is incorrect.

I wish to express my dissatisfaction regarding the recent service changes. As a long-term customer, I expected better communication about the alterations to my account settings, which have caused confusion and inconvenience.

I'm really hoping you can help me with something that's been bothering me a lot lately. I can't seem to figure out how to access my old messages from last year. It feels like they just disappeared and I'm worried about losing important information. Can anyone guide me on this?

hey, my email change didnt go through, i think? like, i m not getting any confirmation emails. what’s up with that?

I recently purchased a subscription for your service, but due to unforeseen circumstances, I am unable to utilize it. I would like to formally request a refund, as I have not used the service at all since activation. Please let me know the procedure for this request.
